title: 10 Days Sri-Lanka
desc: No journey to Sri Lanka is complete without taking a train ride to Kandy.

title: Off the Grid
desc: At the Munshi Aziz Bhat Museum, Alexandra learns about Ladakh's rich history and continues her expedition to Srinagar, admiring the beauty of Mt Kun and Nun Kun glacier on her way.

title: The Gypsies
desc: Benafsha Soonawalla and Krissann Baretto visit Indore, the food capital of Central India and savour the scrumptious delicacies.

title: Backpack
desc: Alexandra explores Plitvice, where she visits a national park, interacts with locals, tastes local wine and then leaves for Zagreb.

title: World Spas
desc: The host travels to and participates in various rejuvenating and relaxing spa treatments at the Shangri La Spa Retreat in Malaysia.

title: Xplore Belgium
desc: Brussels is one of the most cosmopolitan cities of Belgium and also its economic and political centre. There are way too many things to do here. So without much ado, let the exploration begin.

title: Unwind
desc: Sabrina, the host, explores Dubai's old charm by travelling through canals, visiting souks, perfume shops and takes a trip to Wild Wadi Water Park.

title: Off the Grid
desc: The host introduces the tranquil Padum town and continues to explore Zanskar, where she visits the Sani Kanika Monastery that was built in the 17th century.

title: Route 66
desc: Genevieve's journey along the legendary Route 66 begins in Chicago, where towering skyscrapers and city streets give way to the open road.

title: Kissed by the Sea
desc: The host visits the famous Penghu island in Taiwan, lined with exquisite tropical beaches that host a variety of water adventures.

title: Unwind
desc: The host visits Haridwar and explores the many different features of the city for a relaxing time that is unknown to travellers.

title: Bliss
desc: The host explores the beautiful beaches, rich history, vast landscapes, distinctive architecture and delectable food of Santorini, an island located in the Aegean Sea.

title: Best From the Rest
desc: India is a country with rich heritage, culture and history. Five best museums in India are showcased to the audience in order to shed light on the country's glory.

desc: The host sheds light on the perfect atmosphere as night arrives in the Philippines, emphasising some of the finest sun-down options.

desc: The host visits Srinagar, a serene city in India famous for its unique houseboats, flavourful cuisine and exquisite woodwork.

title: Route 66
desc: Crossing from Illinois into Missouri, Genevieve begins to peel back layers of the country's history and the golden age of Route 66.

title: World Spas
desc: With design based on local culture and heritage, Maya Ubud Spa is a hidden piece of paradise.

title: City Breaks
desc: Alex explores Barcelona, a city known for its history and modern infrastructure. She explores Montjuic castle, then visits a local market and the iconic cathedral of Antoni Gaudi, La Sagrada Familia.

title: Xplore Belgium
desc: It's not just about the history, its also about the food, the beers, the chocolate and the fries. The beautiful Belgian city of Bruges seems to have skipped 21st century altogether.

title: Burn Appetite
desc: The host, Chef Jolly, is on the last leg of his journey as he reaches the captivating city of Innsbruck, Austria where he takes in the beautiful sights of the city and cooks up some amazing food.

desc: Alexandra embarks on a thrilling journey, exploring Tsomoriri and the Baralacha Pass. On visiting Korzok village, she talks with the local residents and dresses up in traditional Ladakhi attire.
